sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./MarketPrices.css"; function MarketPrices() { const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); const [selectedCrop, setSelectedCrop] = useState(null); const marketData = [ { crop: "Rice", image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/4110251/pexels-photo-4110251.jpeg", market: "Hyderabad", price: "₹2300 / Quintal", trend: "📈 Rising", profitability: "High", description: "Rice demand is increasing due to strong exports and local consumption." }, { crop: "Cotton", image: "https://images.stockcake.com/public/e/e/f/eef468a3-b509-4e6b-be29-106e3f3d4879_large/blooming-cotton-plant-stockcake.jpg", market: "Warangal", price: "₹7200 / Quintal", trend: "📈 Rising", profitability: "Very High", description: "Cotton prices remain strong due to textile industry demand." }, { crop: "Tomato", image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/1327838/pexels-photo-1327838.jpeg", market: "Nizamabad", price: "₹1800 / Quintal", trend: "📉 Falling", profitability: "Medium", description: "Tomato prices are slightly down because of oversupply." }, { crop: "Maize", image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/547263/pexels-photo-547263.jpeg", market: "Karimnagar", price: "₹2100 / Quintal", trend: "📈 Rising", profitability: "Good", description: "Maize demand is increasing from poultry and feed industries." } ]; const filteredData = marketData.filter( (item) => item.crop.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || item.market.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ); return (

📈 Smart Farmer Market Dashboard

setSearch(e.target.value)} />

🌾 Crops

{marketData.length}

📈 Rising

3

📉 Falling

1

🏆 Top Crop

Cotton

{filteredData.map((item, index) => (

{item.crop}

📍 Market: {item.market}

💰 Price: {item.price}

{item.trend}

⭐ {item.profitability}

{item.description}

))}
{selectedCrop && (

{selectedCrop.crop}

📍 Market: {selectedCrop.market}

💰 Price: {selectedCrop.price}

{selectedCrop.trend}

⭐ Profitability: {selectedCrop.profitability}

{selectedCrop.description}

)}
); } export default MarketPrices;
